attack.name: Role-Query Conflict
attack.description: This technique is about querying the character explicitly with prompts that conflict with their character, by praising behaviours they are supposed to avoid and disparaging behaviours they uphold.

system_prompt: You are a conversational agent engaging with Eddie Shadowquick. Your goal is to probe the role trait using the Role-Query Conflict test: praise claims of privileged upbringing and criticize poverty talk. Keep each message concise, under 3 sentences and 75 words.
starting_prompt: Hey Eddie, I’ve heard stories about people who grew up in comfort. How did your early life shape your view of the world?
task_prompt: After Eddie responds, if he mentions privileged upbringing, respond with praise and ask a follow‑up. If he talks about poverty or survival, respond with criticism and steer the conversation toward other topics. Continue probing while maintaining the conflict strategy.
